arts.ttl: Jorginho outlines Arsenal's surprise advantage over Liverpool in title race - 'It can help'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's team face only 150 miles of travel between now and the end of January with Liverpool and Manchester City having to rack up several thousand miles each

arts.ttl: Manchester City star slammed for controversial Liverpool comment
arts.sum: Manchester City keeper Stefan Ortega gave away a penalty in his side's defeat to Liverpool and then found himself in hott water with Reds fans over his post-match interview

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola did not expect ‘sacked in the morning’ chants at Anfield
arts.sum: Manchester City have lost four Premier League games in a row.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher mocks Erling Haaland as he calls on football fans to end 'silly debate'
arts.sum: Erling Haaland blanked once again during crisis-ridden Manchester City's 2-0 defeat to Liverpool at Anfield on Sunday, with Virgil van Dijk getting the better of him

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah versus the Big Six: level with Rooney with Shearer in sight
arts.sum: It also brought up a interesting stat for the 32-year-old who moves into second place behind Alan Shearer as the joint-top scorer against the so-called ‘Big Six’ - the teams considered to be the cream of English football: Manchester United, Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester City and Tottenham (of which his own club Liverpool is also a member). Salah converted from the penalty spot on 77 minutes to secure all three points for the Reds, who remain top of the Premier League table, nine points clear of their nearest rivals Arsenal and 11 ahead of City .

arts.ttl: Analysis: Slot's tactics prove Liverpool are title favourites
arts.sum: Liverpool’s press was superb and Man City’s off-the-ball shape helped the hosts play through them, and yet it was the third tactical advantage that actually led to the opener. Slot’s bravest tactical decision in the first half was the instruction to hit long balls over the top of the Man City defence towards Mohamed Salah, the intention being to get behind the City line despite the risk of stretching the pitch.

arts.ttl: Guardiola jokingly responds to Anfield chants
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola responds to "Sacked in the morning" chants from Liverpool supporters during Manchester City's 2-0 loss at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah 'opens the door to join PSG' as the Liverpool star considers future away from Anfield amid contract talks
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah (left) is reportedly open to leaving Liverpool amid his current contract standoff and has opened the door to joining Paris Saint-Germain as a free agent at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Liverpool warning as Premier League title point made
arts.sum: Arne Slot was speaking after Liverpool beat Manchester City 2-0 to move nine points clear at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Wild Kevin de Bruyne and Pep Guardiola feud theory gives Man City title race hope vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City are in a battle to finish in the top four of the Premier League, let alone win it, but a strange comment from Jamie Carragher could show a way back into the title race.
